understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by finishing each level, where winning a level required placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; the overall game would be won once the engine reported WIN after meeting that condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done via grid-based actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, and selection/switching (or attempting to move directly) was done using CLICK with a target position in the same coordinate system as the piece positions; pieces could not move into blocked tiles (walls/obstacles) or through other blocking geometry, so clicks on unreachable/blocked destinations had no effect, and each action consumed one step from a finite per-level budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by finishing each level, where winning a level required placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; the overall game would be won once the engine reported WIN after meeting that condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done via grid-based actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, and selection/switching (or attempting to move directly) was done using CLICK with a target position in the same coordinate system as the piece positions; pieces could not move into blocked tiles (walls/obstacles) or through other blocking geometry, so clicks on unreachable/blocked destinations had no effect, and each action consumed one step from a finite per-level budget.
